{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Awakened sword
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] has an [[Awakened sword]] on his hip.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] crushed an [[Awakened sword]] to pieces.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
